title: Distributed assets are versioned governed products
summary: Every asset is reproducible, licensed, owned, checksummed, supportable, and deprecatable.
guidance: Publish only approved derivatives from immutable versioned masters with manifest metadata and a support lifecycle.
do: Expose license, version, intended use, and support before download
dont: Mix community assets with official approval
Delete audit history when withdrawing a download
verification: Checksum, export reproducibility, SVG safety, rights, accessibility, link, and restore checks
